content.en:
"You have to find a way to obtain the Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pill, so that your cultivation can break through to the peak realm of the first realm, so as to impact the second realm of the super dimensional realm!"

And Ye Tian pondered for a long time, but he still hadn't thought of a way.

Unless he joins other factions, many of them will not recruit outsiders.

Because outsiders are not too loyal to the forces, if they spend a lot of money to cultivate, and then run away in the future and join more powerful forces, it will be more than worth the loss.

For example, in the 6000th Territory, those extra-dimensional forces are all cultivated internally, even if it is the Garan Chamber of Commerce, it is also cultivated internally, and it is divided into a large number of families internally, and the extra-dimensional realm is constantly cultivated for the Garan Chamber of Commerce.

Therefore, they don't need to solicit extradimensional realms from the outside world.

Only the kind of force that is about to be in a state of extinction will rush to recruit the powerful extradimensional realm, but that kind of force will not be able to take out the superdimensional Chiyuan Dan.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to investigate the traces of the Super Dimensional Chiyuan Dan.

However, forces such as the Garan Chamber of Commerce would not sell the Extradimensional Chiyuan Pill.

Last time, the reason why the Nine Pastures Realm Lord of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce was willing to trade the Great Realm Armor Technique to him was because this thing was useless, and it could not improve its strength, and trading it would not affect the foundation of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce.

Treasures that can help other strong people quickly improve their strength, they will not trade casually.

Unless, Ye Tian can come up with enough resources to make the Jialan Chamber of Commerce excited, they will take out the Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pill to trade with Ye Tian.

But Ye Tian obviously couldn't take out such a treasure, so he had to find another way.

In the blink of an eye, another five extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally thought of a way to obtain the Extradimensional Chiyuan Pill.

"Sky Survey Realm Snake Clan!"

Ye Tian had also copied the body of a Heaven Surveying Realm Snake to find the fragments of the Extradimensional Realm Boundary Stone.

At that time, he only had a brief understanding of the Heaven Survey Realm Snake, and now he knew the power of the Heaven Survey Realm Snake.

The Six Thousand Territory is just a branch of the Sky Survey Snake Clan, and the background of the Sky Survey Snake Clan is very terrifying, and the headquarters of the Sky Survey Snake is located in the Five One Hundred Territory.

And the Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pill is also helpful to Super Dimensional Creatures, which can help them refine their Super Dimensional Bodies and strengthen their Super Dimensional Bloodlines.

It's just that the Extradimensional Chiyuan Pill is the most suitable for cultivators, and it is even more valuable to cultivators.

Ye Tian wanted to blend in with the Sky Survey Realm Snake Clan and use the identity of the Sky Survey Realm Snake Clan to obtain the Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pill.

Moreover, he had heard that the headquarters of the Snake Clan in the Heaven Survey Realm, the strongest was only in the third realm, and there was no existence in the fourth realm.

Therefore, if he obtained the Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pill and left, even if the Heaven Survey Snake Clan found it later, it would not be possible to infer his traces.

Of course, with the power of the powerhouse of the Fourth Realm, he still didn't dare to do this, otherwise he would be looking for death.

"That's it's done."

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

The territory of the six thousand, near the territory of the Snake of the Surveying Realm.

Ye Tian came here, he needed to lure out a Heaven Survey Realm Snake of the First Realm Transcendent Realm, and then attack it.

Soon, Ye Tian used a half-step extradimensional realm replica body to break into the territory of the Heaven Survey Realm Snake.

Sure enough, a Heaven Survey Realm snake of the First Realm appeared, instantly killing Ye Tian's duplicate body.

Just as the other party was about to leave, Ye Tian immediately urged the Great Realm Armor Technique, letting the aura of the Great Realm Armor Technique envelop this area, making this area impossible to be deduced by the Third Realm.

"Who?"

This First Realm Heaven Survey Realm Serpent said in fear.

The next moment.

An extradimensional rule of light enveloped his body, easily shattering his flesh, leaving only a few items behind.

And Ye Tian immediately began to copy the body of this Heaven Survey Realm Snake, and in an instant, an incomparably huge Heaven Survey Realm Snake appeared, and its aura was exactly the same as the Heaven Survey Realm Snake just now.

"That's it!"

In this way, Ye Tian mixed into the Heaven Survey Realm Snake Territory.

However, this is still easy to find, for example, there is a third realm trying to deduce him, but the result cannot be calculated, then there is a problem!

How could a normal First Realm Heaven Survey Realm snake not be able to calculate it, if it can't be calculated, it will inevitably be investigated, and some problems will definitely be found at that time.

Therefore, he had to obtain some extra-dimensional Chiyuan pills in a short period of time and bring them out.

...... []

Inside the Heaven Survey Realm Snake Territory, there is a Heaven Survey Realm Snake Temple.

Ye Tian entered the Heaven Survey Realm Snake Territory, briefly understood the situation, and reported that he had comprehended the extradimensional rules on this day.

Once you comprehend the rules of the extradimensional dimension, you will naturally be focused on cultivating by the Heaven Survey Snake Clan.

Ye Tian applied to receive some super-dimensional Chiyuan pills as soon as possible, after all, the cultivation of his copied body had not reached the peak of the first realm, and it was naturally normal to apply for some super-dimensional Chiyuan pills.

If it is an ordinary extradimensional realm and wants to apply for the superdimensional Chiyuan Pill, it will definitely not be given.

However, the Heaven Survey Realm Snake that Ye Tian turned into comprehended the rules of the extradimensional dimension, so he naturally had to cultivate it vigorously.

Soon, ten super-dimensional Chiyuan pills were sent to Ye Tian.

It's in hand, I have to leave as soon as possible, my copy body, only the middle of the first realm is cultivated, but I understand the rules of the super dimension, I'm afraid it will be a sensation in the headquarters of the Sky Survey Realm Snake Clan, if you don't leave, maybe the Heaven Survey Realm Snake of the third realm will come over. "

Immediately.

Ye Tian immediately chose to leave the territory of the Heaven Survey Realm Snake.

After leaving the territory of the Sky Survey Realm Snake, he immediately handed over the ten Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pills to the True Body Replica Body, and then immediately lifted the Sky Survey Realm Snake Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pill.

Then, he quickly left.

And not long after Ye Tian left, a Third Realm Heaven Survey Realm Snake appeared in this territory, but it turned out that Ye Tian could not be found.

After (Li Nuohao), the third realm used a deduction treasure to calculate.

With this calculation, the entire Heaven Survey Realm Snake Clan was furious.

The Heaven Survey Realm Snake of the Third Realm couldn't calculate Ye Tian's traces, and he couldn't calculate any information, but he could deduce that this new demon clan member of the Heaven Survey Realm Snake Clan had already fallen.

What does this mean?

This shows that this demon clan is a fake at all, disguised by the enemy, but they didn't see it, and they thought it was the demon genius of the Heaven Surveying Realm Snake, and they planned to focus on cultivating.

"Damn, it's definitely a village disguised in the extradimensional realm of the third realm!"

The Third Realm of the Snake Clan of the Heaven Survey Realm was furious, but he was also very puzzled, what did this enemy of the Third Realm want to do, could it be that he could not achieve it in order to pit ten super-dimensional Chiyuan Pills, not so much!

But he couldn't even imagine that Ye Tian was not the third realm, but the first realm, and the purpose was the super-dimensional Chiyuan Dan.
